tracks.meaning: to arrange data or items in a specified order, typically alphabetical, numerical, or by some other criterion
to separate or classify things into groups or categories
a person of a particular kind or character, as in 'a bad sort' or 'a good sort'
a computing operation that arranges records or files in a database according to specified keys or fields
to distribute printed type characters back into their compartments in a typesetting case
to distribute mail, packages, or items into categories or destinations for delivery
